# Core Heterogeneity

**Summary**: The variation in physical properties like permeability and porosity across a rock sample.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2000-hamid|Hamid, 2000]] used pulse-decay to detect core heterogeneity in whole samples.

## Scientific Context

- [[2000-hamid|Hamid, 2000]] Critical for understanding flow distribution in reservoir rocks.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2000-hamid|Hamid, 2000]] Identified by comparing pulse-decay results with steady-state data.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The proposed method can help detect core heterogeneity compared to steady-state methods. ([[2000-hamid|Hamid, 2000, p. 16]])
